holdings.infoBox: RIFR is an equity ETF with a total of 71 individual holdings. The top holdings are Aena S.M.E. stock at 5.20%, Transurban Group at 5.10%, NextEra Energy at 4.64%, Union Pacific at 4.62%, and CSX Corporation at 3.44%.

overview.description: The Russell Investments Global Infrastructure ETF (RIFR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth and current income through investments in infrastructure stocks globally. RIFR was launched on May 14, 2025 and is issued by Russell Investments.
